steps: Sample arrives in HBSS, at Room temperature .
Weigh and divide sample to 150 mg - 200 mg, section of tissue .
Make several cuts in thin sections in the tissue (similar to a bivalve for the fallopian tube) but do not “mince” ( 150 mg - 200 mg, tissue per tube).
Place 150 mg - 200 mg, tissue in 10 mL, pronase and place on 37 °C shaker, 200 rpm, °C, , 00:05:00 - 00:10:00 .

Filter cell suspension #1 using a 100 μm filter, remove tissue from filter, rinse filter with 10 mL, DMEM/FBS (important for quenching digestion), spin filtrate at 600 x g, °C, 5 minutes , resuspend the pellet in 100 µL, DMEM/FBS , place On ice .
Re-suspend tissue in digestion buffer and place on 37 °C shaker, 200 rpm, °C, 30 minutes .
After 00:30:00 (60 min total digestion) filter cell suspension #3 as above. go to step #7
After 00:20:00 (80 min total digestion) filter cell suspension #4 as above. go to step #7
After 00:20:00 (100 minutes total digestion), filter cell suspension #5 as above, discarding remaining tissue after it is removed. go to step #7
Combine all cell suspensions from each step ( 100 µL suspension from each sample, 500 µL total) in FACS tube.
Filter cell suspension #2 using a 100 μm filter.
Remove the tissue from the filter and re-suspend in digestion buffer. Place back on 37 °C shaker, 200 rpm, °C, for another 00:30:00 .
After tissue is removed, rinse the filter with 10 mL, DMEM/FBS to quench.
Spin filtrate #2 at 600 x g, °C, 5 minutes , resuspend the pellet in 100 µL, DMEM/FBS .
Add 4.5 mL, red cell solution .
Vortex 00:00:05 and incubate 00:02:00 at Room temperature .
Centrifuge 600 x g, °C, 5 minutes . Remove supernatant and discard.
Re-suspend pellet in 500 µL, DMEM or can proceed to washes.
Wash 3 times with 2 mL, PBS/0.04% BSA in FACS tube. Spin down at 600 x g, °C, 5 minutes between washes.
Wash with 2 mL, PBS/0.04% BSA in FACS tube. (1/3)
Spin at 300 x g, °C, 3 minutes . (1/2)
Wash with 2 mL, PBS/0.04% BSA in FACS tube. (2/3)
Spin at 300 x g, °C, 3 minutes . (2/2)
Wash with 2 mL, PBS/0.04% BSA in FACS tube. (3/3)
Use 100 μm to filter after last wash.
Re-suspend pellet in 1 mL, DMEM/10%FBS .
Add DAPI at 1:500 for flow cytometry analysis for live/dead.
Apply 30 µL, single cell solution to the slide and allow slide to dry in the incubator for 00:20:00 - 00:30:00 .
Draw wax circles.
Fix with 4 %, PFA x 00:05:00 .
Wash 2 x 00:05:00 in PBS, store at 4 °C .
creator: Nicole Ulrich
